item.title: 杨立昆新创人工智能公司获10亿美元种子轮融资
item.description: 人工智能领域的先驱人物杨立昆为一家初创企业筹集了10.3亿美元资金，该公司承诺研发出比ChatGPT等现有人工智能产品更擅长应对现实世界挑战的技术。【原文：Yann LeCun, a pioneer in the field of artificial intelligence, has raised $1.03 billion for a nascent startup that promises to invent technology more capable of navigating the real world than existing AI products like ChatGPT.】

item.title: 伊朗冲击颠覆房地产市场期待已久的复苏态势
item.description: 俄罗斯入侵乌克兰导致房地产十年狂欢戛然而止五年后，南面约1600英里处爆发的另一场战争，如今正威胁着扼杀投资者自那以来一直期待的复苏。【原文：Five years after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine brought real estate’s decade-long party to a sudden halt, another war about 1,600 miles south is now threatening to choke off the recovery investors have been anticipating ever since.】

item.title: “彻底恐慌”：原油市场周一狂飙，交易员承受极限考验
item.description: 即便以全球油市过山车般的波动标准来看，周一的剧烈震荡也考验着交易员的极限。【原文：Even by the roller-coaster standards of the global oil market, Monday’s extreme swings tested traders’ limits.】

item.title: 特朗普暗示可能结束伊朗战争，农产品价格转跌
item.description: 随着美国总统特朗普的言论缓解了人们对中东战争将长期持续的担忧，农产品价格随原油价格一同下跌。【原文：Crop prices fell alongside a slump in crude oil, after comments from US President Donald Trump eased concerns the war in the Middle East would be long-lasting.】

item.title: 中国Z世代日内交易者信赖聊天机器人并推动市场波动
item.description:
这一群体已成为世界第二大经济体中投资增长日益重要的驱动力。

【原文：

This cohort has become an increasingly important driver of investment growth in the world’s second-largest economy.

】

item.title: 足够多冷静的头脑正在从悬崖边缘退却
item.description:
市场波动主要受情绪驱动，亚洲和欧洲地区受影响最为显著。【原文：

Sentiment is driving the market gyrations, with Asia and Europe most exposed.

】

item.title: 人民币汇率走强，因央行将汇率中间价上调幅度扩大至1月以来最大
item.description: 在岸人民币汇率上涨，此前中国人民银行将该管理型货币的每日参考汇率上调幅度创2025年1月以来新高。【原文：The onshore yuan rose after the People’s Bank of China strengthened the daily reference rate for the managed currency by the most since January 2025.】

item.title: 庞大船队集结与疾驰油轮指向霍尔木兹海峡交通堵塞
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡附近已出现至少十余个船只集群，这很可能是该水道周边电子干扰加剧的迹象——该水道是美以两国对伊朗战争的核心战略要冲。【原文：At least a dozen clusters of ships have appeared near the Strait of Hormuz, a likely sign of elevated electronic interference around the waterway that’s central to the US and Israeli war against Iran.】

item.title: 中国增加原油进口以防范供应中断
item.description: 今年前两个月，中国原油进口量有所增加，该国持续囤积石油以防范供应中断风险。【原文：China purchased more crude in the first two months of the year as the country continued to hoard oil to guard against supply disruptions.】

item.title: 未对冲航空燃油价格使亚航成为表现最差的航空股
item.description: 廉价航空公司亚航X正为其在航空燃油上的错误押注付出高昂代价。管理层在油价低迷时未采取对冲措施的决策，在伊朗战争爆发后适得其反，使该公司成为全球表现最差的航空股。【原文：Low-cost carrier AirAsia X Bhd is paying a steep price for its wrong-way bet on jet fuel. Management’s decision not to hedge when oil was cheap has backfired after the Iran war, and the company is now the worst-performing airline stock in the world.】

item.title: 腾讯、智普股价因推出基于OpenClaw的人工智能代理而大涨
item.description: 中国对OpenClaw的热情正点燃本土科技企业的股价上涨，这些公司正迅速拥抱这款开源人工智能程序。【原文：China’s enthusiasm for OpenClaw is igniting a stock rally in local technology firms moving swiftly to embrace the open-source artificial intelligence program.】

item.title: 中国收益率曲线受油价波动影响触及四年最陡水平
item.description: 中国政府债券收益率曲线达到近四年来的最陡水平，因伊朗战争引发的通胀担忧给长期债务带来压力。【原文：China’s government bond yield curve reached its steepest level in about four years, as inflation concerns triggered by the Iran war pile pressure on longer‑term debt.】

item.title: 中东战争爆发前中国出口激增22%
item.description: 今年前两个月，中国出口增速远超预期，在美以对伊朗发动袭击扰乱全球贸易之前，出口已走上创纪录的增长轨道。【原文：China’s export growth accelerated far faster than expected in the first two months of the year, putting shipments on a record path before US and Israeli strikes on Iran disrupted global trade.】

item.title: 马来西亚棕榈油期货开盘下跌逾4%
item.description: 周二开市时，吉隆坡棕榈油期货一度下跌4.3%，跟随原油价格的跌势。此前美国总统特朗普表示中东战争可能即将结束。【原文：Palm oil futures in Kuala Lumpur fell as much as 4.3% at the open on Tuesday, tracking a slump in crude oil prices after President Donald Trump said the war in the Middle East may end soon.】

item.title: 胜科20亿澳元贷款助力澳大利亚融资热潮
item.description: 知情人士透露，新加坡胜科工业有限公司正寻求约30亿澳元（合21亿美元）贷款，用于收购电力生产商兼零售商Alinta Energy Pty.，此举进一步推高了澳大利亚并购融资的热潮。【原文：Singapore’s Sembcorp Industries Ltd. is seeking a loan of around A$3 billion ($2.1 billion) to back its purchase of power generator and retailer Alinta Energy Pty., according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a growing wave of acquisition funding in Australia.】

item.title: 苹果公司将生产重心从中国转向印度后，目前约25%的iPhone在印度制造
item.description: 苹果公司去年在印度的iPhone产量增长了约53%，目前四分之一的主打设备在当地生产，这反映出这家美国公司为规避中国关税所做的努力。【原文：Apple Inc. increased iPhone production in India by about 53% last year and now makes a quarter of its marquee devices there, reflecting the US company’s efforts to avoid tariffs on China.】

item.title: 投资者削减杠杆，伊朗冲突与油价飙升搅动印度市场
item.description: 保证金融资已降至11月以来的最低水平。【原文：Margin funding has dropped to the lowest since November.】

item.title: 亿万富豪支持的科塔克银行开放交易，首席执行官宣称资本充足
item.description: 科塔克马辛德拉银行有限公司正积极寻求收购机会。这家由亿万富翁乌代·科塔克支持的金融机构，正试图在印度金融业转型之际，利用其过剩资本实现规模扩张。【原文：Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. is on the lookout for acquisitions as the billionaire Uday Kotak-backed lender seeks to deploy its excess capital to scale up amid a transformation of India’s financial industry.】

item.title: 亚洲信用风险指标下滑，特朗普暗示战争或将终结
item.description: 亚洲信用保护成本创八个月来最大跌幅，此前美国总统特朗普暗示伊朗战争可能即将结束。【原文：The cost of credit protection fell by the most in over eight months in Asia, after President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war may be nearing an end.】

item.title: 市场同时遭受战争、人工智能压力和信贷危机三重冲击
item.description:
多重力量正以难以轻易解决的方式相互碰撞——而传统的逢低买入策略远非万无一失。

【原文：

Multiple forces are colliding in ways that defy easy fixes — and the old playbook of buying the dip is far from guaranteed to work.

】

item.title: 卡米尼亚克将支持激进投资者帕利瑟针对LG化学的行动
item.description: 凯明纳克资产管理公司正支持英国激进投资基金帕利瑟资本发起的行动，旨在改善韩国LG化学公司的公司治理并提升股东价值。【原文：Carmignac Gestion is supporting a campaign by UK-based activist fund Palliser Capital to try to improve corporate governance and boost shareholder value at South Korea’s LG Chem Ltd.】

item.title: 铝价延续跌势，中东供应担忧缓解
item.description: 铝价延续自四年高点以来的跌势，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普暗示可能结束伊朗战争，这场战争曾导致中东地区铝供应中断。【原文：Aluminum extended its retreat from a four-year high after US President Donald Trump signaled a possible end to the Iran war, which has disrupted supplies of the metal from the Middle East.】

item.title: 印度央行加大对卢比和债券支持力度，应对油价波动
item.description: 分析师表示，随着原油价格波动加剧通胀风险并给政府财政带来压力，印度央行可能在货币和债券市场中发挥更大作用。【原文：India’s central bank may play a bigger role in both currency and bond markets as volatility in crude oil prices raises the risk of higher inflation and putting pressure on government finances, analysts say.】

item.title: 印尼央行或将捍卫卢比汇率，分析师称油价波动加剧
item.description: 印尼央行可能继续在关键汇率关口附近捍卫印尼盾，因油价波动、美元走强以及伊朗冲突引发的避险资金流动，加剧了市场对该国投资吸引力的担忧。【原文：Indonesia’s central bank may continue to defend the rupiah around a key threshold as volatile oil prices, a stronger dollar and risk-off flows tied to the Iran conflict deepen concerns over the nation’s investment appeal.】

item.title: Planet Labs因伊朗风险延长中东卫星影像延迟
item.description: Planet Labs PBC公司将中东地区商业卫星图像的延迟发布时限从四天延长至两周，因担忧相关情报可能被用于锁定北大西洋公约组织成员国。【原文：Planet Labs PBC is extending its delay on commercial satellite imagery in the Middle East to two weeks from four days over concerns that the intelligence could be used to target North Atlantic Treaty Organization members.】

item.title: 澳大利亚将因伊朗战争实现预算盈余，但家庭收入受挫，BE表示
item.description: 彭博经济研究指出，受伊朗战争推动液化天然气和煤炭出口价格上涨的影响，澳大利亚财政收入将获得提振，但家庭将因汽油成本飙升而承受压力。【原文：Australia’s fiscal coffers are set to be boosted by higher liquefied natural gas and coal export prices fueled by the war in Iran, while households will be hit by surging gasoline costs, according to a research note from Bloomberg Economics.】

item.title: 五角大楼官员认为重启人类中心主义人工智能协议可能性渺茫
item.description: 五角大楼一位高级官员认为，在该公司对政府前所未有的举措——将该公司列为供应链风险——提出法律挑战后，与Anthropic PBC就其人工智能工具的军事用途恢复谈判的可能性微乎其微。【原文：A top Pentagon official sees little chance of resuming negotiations with Anthropic PBC over military use of its artificial intelligence tools following the company’s legal challenge of an unprecedented government move to declare the firm a supply-chain risk.】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道：蒙古国寻求修改里约公司奥尤陶勒盖矿贷款协议
item.description: 据《金融时报》周二报道，蒙古政府正寻求与力拓集团重新谈判一笔贷款，该国曾利用这笔贷款支付其在全球最大铜矿床之一建设项目中的份额。【原文：Mongolia’s government is seeking to renegotiate a loan from Rio Tinto Group, which the nation used to fund its share of building one of the world’s biggest copper deposits, the Financial Times reported Tuesday.】

item.title: 新西兰联储或面临超预期通胀，布雷曼面临考验
item.description: 新西兰通胀率不太可能如央行预测般大幅放缓，因伊朗战争推高燃料成本，市场押注加息时间将提前。【原文：New Zealand inflation is unlikely to slow as much as the central bank predicts as the Iran war lifts fuel costs, increasing bets on an earlier interest-rate hike.】

item.title: 铝价飙升助中国富豪身价飙升至480亿美元
item.description: 2019年张波接管父亲的工业帝国时，这已是一家规模庞大的工业巨头，也是全球最大的铝生产商之一。【原文：When Zhang Bo took over his father’s industrial empire in 2019, it was already a sprawling industrial giant and one of the world’s biggest producers of aluminum.】
